_comment: Multi-Blender instance registry. Each entry = one Blender process on a unique port. Agents claim instances via lock files to avoid collisions.

usage.launch_blender: Open Blender, install addon, change PORT in addon preferences to 9877

addon_port_config: In Blender: Edit > Preferences > Add-ons > OpenClaw Blender Bridge > change PORT constant in script, or set env BLENDER_MCP_PORT before launching Blender
